summary: iter238 testing completed - 30/30 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified. New retail outlets (6), employees (18), hours of operation, schedule platform, concierge v2 (amenity/issue/valet/HK/off-prop/hours), purchasing groups, and outlet analytics all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for amenities, guest issues, valet/HK requests
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter238 adds: (1) POST /api/outlets/seed-retail seeds 6 retail outlets + 18 employees, (2) GET /api/outlets/retail and /api/outlets/all for outlet lists, (3) GET /api/employees with outlet_id/position/available_day/available_slot filters, (4) POST /api/employees/{id}/message for messaging, (5) GET/PATCH /api/outlets/{id}/hours for hours of operation with seasonal overrides, (6) POST/GET /api/schedules/week and POST /api/schedules/{id}/push for schedule platform (Twilio SMS stubbed), (7) POST /api/concierge/amenity for amenity dispatch with guest profile + activity events, (8) POST /api/concierge/guest-issue with severity emoji mapping (happy→😊, neutral→😐, sad→😟, angry→😠) + auto-ticket creation, (9) POST /api/concierge/guest-issue/{id}/elevate, (10) POST /api/concierge/valet and /api/concierge/housekeeping, (11) GET /api/concierge/off-property returns 5 suggestions, (12) GET /api/maestro/beo/recent, (13) GET /api/purchasing/groups returns 4 groups (A/F/E/D), (14) GET /api/purchasing/item/{name}/price-compare returns 4 quotes with is_cheapest flag, (15) GET /api/outlets/{id}/analytics returns kind-aware KPIs (service: appointments/ticket/rebook, retail: units/avg-txn/conversion/returns, kids: enrollments/sessions/attendance, F&B: covers/avg-check/food%/labor%) + third_party_split for 3rd-party outlets. Frontend: StaffConciergeV2 with 6 tiles (svc-amenity, svc-issue, svc-valet, svc-hk, svc-offprop, svc-hours), accessed via quick-concierge from Echo button quick-launch. Hours view shows all outlets with 3rd-party indicator in orange.

backend.GET /api/outlets/retail: PASS - Returns 6 rows including 'Everything But Water' with owned_by='third-party' and revenue_share_pct=15
backend.GET /api/outlets/all: PASS - Returns F&B + retail outlets combined
backend.GET /api/employees?outlet_id=outlet-salo: PASS - Returns 3 employees with positions and color_tags
backend.GET /api/outlets/{id}/hours: PASS - Returns default hours when no doc exists
backend.PATCH /api/outlets/{id}/hours (base_hour: PASS - Updates and persists base hours
backend.GET /api/schedules/week: PASS - Returns saved week with shifts
backend.POST /api/concierge/amenity: PASS - Returns ok, amenity_id, creates guest profile + 3 activity events
backend.POST /api/concierge/guest-issue (angry): PASS - Returns severity_emoji='😠', creates high-priority ticket
backend.GET /api/maestro/beo/recent: PASS - Returns ok with rows (may be empty)
backend.GET /api/purchasing/groups: PASS - Returns 4 groups with logo_letter A/F/E/D
backend.GET /api/purchasing/item/cucumber/price-: PASS - Returns 4 quotes with exactly one is_cheapest=true

frontend.Echo mini button: PASS - Long press opens voice panel, short tap opens quick launch
frontend.Quick launch sheet: PASS - Shows Concierge tile among others
frontend.6 concierge tiles: PASS - svc-amenity, svc-issue, svc-valet, svc-hk, svc-offprop, svc-hours all present
frontend.Amenity form: PASS - All 7 fields present (room, first, last, type, value, reason, submit)
frontend.Guest issue form: PASS - 4 severity buttons (happy/neutral/sad/angry), dept dropdown, elevate checkbox, submit
frontend.Issue table field conditional: PASS - Shows when dept=dining, hides otherwise
frontend.Valet form: PASS - room, name, submit fields present
frontend.Hours view: PASS - Shows 6 outlet rows with today's hours, 'Everything But Water' shows '3rd-party · split' in orange
